don't know.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, performance, and a new team structure.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New GrowthX Structure:** Jo is now Engagement Manager (strategy/analytics); Jenn Peters is Production Lead (execution).](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** The focus is on refreshing old posts with Superhuman Mail messaging, AI angles, and natural mentions of Coda/Grammarly.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**November Performance:** Traffic was flat (6.5k sessions), but engagement was high (\~60%). Top 10 Google rankings grew 24% (500→640 queries), while LLM traffic declined.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [**Competitive Threat (Fixer):** Fixer is winning LLM visibility for Gmail/Outlook topics. The team will review Superhuman's competitive positioning to counter this.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Topics

### New GrowthX Team Structure

  - [GrowthX introduced a new structure to streamline the Superhuman account.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Jo Kaminska → Engagement Manager**](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Leads strategy, analytics, and high-level decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [Primary contact for Morgan and Alex.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Jenn Peters → Production Lead**](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Manages end-to-end content production and editing.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Will monitor Slack for updates (e.g., new white papers) but will not attend meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

### Content Strategy & Execution

  - [The primary focus is refreshing existing content, not creating new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**Goal:** Update messaging for the Superhuman Mail rebrand and integrate new product angles.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [**Grammarly & Coda Integration:**](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
      - [Mentions will be natural and value-focused, not promotional.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Avoid keyword competition with Grammarly's SEO team.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [**Action:** Link directly to product pages (e.g., Grammarly.com), not to partnership content.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [**Topical Pillars:**](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [The strategy will be refined into 5–6 core clusters to better track performance.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [**Process:** Jo will create a Notion doc for review by Morgan, Alex, and Harmony.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)

### November Performance Review

  - [**Traffic & Engagement:**](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [**Sessions:** 6,500 (flat vs. Oct).](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [**Engaged Sessions:** \~4,000 (\~60% rate).](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Flat traffic is a positive signal for a typically slow B2B month.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [**Google Search Console (GSC):**](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
      - [**Top 10 Rankings:** Grew 24% (500→640 queries).](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is a strong signal of increasing organic visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - **Trend:** Declined to \<300 sessions in November, down from a September peak.
      - [**Source:** Primarily ChatGPT, with Perplexity and Gemini contributing.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [**Rationale:** LLM traffic is a small fraction (1–5%) of total sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [**Scrunch (LLM Visibility):**](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [**Superhuman Visibility:** 26% (1,100+ responses).](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Superhuman leads the pack, but the channel is highly volatile and inconsistent.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)

### Competitive Analysis: Fixer

  - [**Problem:** Fixer is winning LLM visibility for Gmail/Outlook-related prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [**Context:** Fixer is a more affordable, easier-to-adopt tool that works within existing email clients.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**Insight:** Superhuman Mail is a full email client replacement, not an add-on.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [**Action:** The team will review Superhuman's competitive positioning (Notion doc) to refine its strategy against Fixer.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
      - [Send Morgan a list of 6 top-performing recent articles for the Grammarly team.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
      - [Create a Notion doc for the new topical pillar strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [Discuss Fixer strategy with GrowthX directors and schedule a follow-up with Morgan and Alex.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [**Morgan:**](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
      - [Grant Jenn Peters access to the "Superhuman AI competitive positioning" Notion doc.](https://fathom.video/share/WMgk7CSwQE_CwMHwF1a9gAYm8uCFxV7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
